title: Carpal tunnel symptoms

investigations.text: Supports carpal-tunnel diagnostic terminology and clinician use of symptom-and-sign history within CTS-6, with selected ultrasound or electrodiagnostic testing when needed.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-led diagnostic assessment context for carpal-tunnel symptoms; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports carpal-tunnel diagnostic terminology and clinician use of symptom-and-sign history within CTS-6, with selected ultrasound or electrodiagnostic testing when needed.

source.title: Management of Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Evidence-Based Clinical Practice Guideline

treatment_and_management.text: Defines the current adult carpal-tunnel diagnostic and management population and confirms the 2024 guideline scope.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Defines the carpal-tunnel population and evidence scope for carpal-tunnel symptoms; no decision is generated.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Distribution, nocturnal symptoms, weakness, dexterity, provocative findings, differential, occupational factors and testing are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for carpal-tunnel symptoms.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
